title: SRE: Critical Database Connectivity & Schema Recovery
description: The portal is blank because the /api/bets endpoint returns 'Database error'. SRE Agent must: 1. Verify GCP Postgres connectivity from the MacBook native process. 2. Verify if 'bestfam_control' database and 'bet_tracking' table exist. 3. Fix the frontend .env to ensure it picks up the correct DATABASE_URL. 4. Run database migrations if necessary.
